stemHtml:
Refer to figures or CAP698 MRJT take-off density subgraph and file 4.9.
Given the following information, determine the V1 - VR - V2 speeds for an MRJT aeroplane.

Runway: 27
Runway slope: 0.1% DOWN
OAT: +42°C
Pressure Altitude: 111 ft
RTOM: 59 300 kg
Actual Take-Off Mass: 50 810 kg
W/V: 180°/10 kt
Flaps: 15°

options.a: V<sub>1</sub> - 132 kt, V<sub>R</sub> - 134 kt, V<sub>2</sub> - 143 kt.
options.b: V<sub>1</sub> - 146 kt, V<sub>R</sub> - 149 kt, V<sub>2</sub> - 155 kt.
options.c: V<sub>1</sub> - 139 kt, V<sub>R</sub> - 140 kt, V<sub>2</sub> - 146 kt.
options.d: V<sub>1</sub> - 125 kt, V<sub>R</sub> - 126 kt, V<sub>2</sub> - 135 kt.
